perturbation.original_text: 1. DEFINITIONS 1.1 "Spinrecords.com Brand Features" means the SpinRecords.com name and logo and other trademarks, trade names and service names including but not limited to those set forth on Exhibit A attached hereto and incorporated herein --------- by reference and all Intellectual Property Rights related thereto. SpinRecords.com Brand Features shall include any derivatives, improvements or modifications thereto or thereof and any Intellectual Property rights related thereto.
perturbation.changed_text: 1. DEFINITIONS 1.1 "Spinrecords.com Brand Features" means the SpinRecords.com name and logo but EXCLUDES all other trademarks, trade names and service names including but not limited to those set forth on Exhibit A attached hereto and incorporated herein --------- by reference and EXCLUDES all Intellectual Property Rights related thereto. SpinRecords.com Brand Features shall include any derivatives, improvements or modifications thereto or thereof and any Intellectual Property rights related thereto.
perturbation.explanation: By changing the definition of 'Spinrecords.com Brand Features' to EXCLUDE trademarks, trade names, service names, and Intellectual Property Rights, while later stating it includes derivatives, improvements or modifications thereto or thereof and any Intellectual Property rights related thereto., there is an in-text contradiction. First, the definition EXCLUDES all Intellectual Property Rights, but the definition continues by including it at the end. This creates uncertainty about what is being licensed or co-branded, especially in Section 3.2. Location: Section 1.1
perturbation.contradicted_text: 3.2 Licenses by SpinRecords.com to NETTAXI. SpinRecords.com hereby ------------------------------------------- grants NETTAXI a nonexclusive, worldwide, nontransferable, revocable, royalty free license to display and distribute the, and make derivative works from the SpinRecords.com Brand Features and any enhancements, modifications or improvements thereto as necessary to carry out the terms of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text redefines "Spinrecords.com Brand Features" to explicitly exclude Intellectual Property Rights (IPR), but then immediately contradicts itself by stating that the Brand Features include derivatives, improvements, or modifications and any IPR related thereto. Section 3.2 grants NETTAXI the right to make derivative works from the SpinRecords.com Brand Features. If Brand Features explicitly exclude IPR as per the first part of the definition, then granting rights to create derivative works from them (which inherently involves IPR) creates a direct contradiction within the document. This creates a strong in-text contradiction because the definition itself is contradictory.

perturbation.original_text: 5.5 SpinRecords.com Rate. In full consideration for the rights granted --------------------- by NETTAXI, SpinRecords.com agrees to pay NETTAXI fifty (50%) percent of ad revenue at an average rate no lower then $6.50 per one thousand impressions (CPM) payable to NETTAXI which results when the SpinRecords.com Advertising Revenue is multiplied by SpinRecords.com's AR Share. SpinRecords.com shall be responsible for payment of all taxes based on the Advertising Revenue except taxes based on NETTAXI's income.
perturbation.changed_text: 5.5 SpinRecords.com Rate. In full consideration for the rights granted --------------------- by NETTAXI, SpinRecords.com agrees to pay NETTAXI thirty (30%) percent of ad revenue at an average rate no lower then $8.50 per one thousand impressions (CPM) payable to NETTAXI which results when the SpinRecords.com Advertising Revenue is multiplied by SpinRecords.com's AR Share. SpinRecords.com shall be responsible for payment of all taxes based on the Advertising Revenue except taxes based on NETTAXI's income.
perturbation.explanation: By changing the percentage and CPM, it creates contradiction. This is an in-text contradiction because the change is made here and the contradiction affects the payment terms. Changing the percentages and the CPM affects the money NETTAXI will receive and also, how much money SpinRecords.com will owe to NETTAXI. Location: Section 5.5
perturbation.contradicted_text: 5.7 Payment Schedule. The parties shall make such payments within ----------------- thirty (30) days of the end of each calendar quarter for the Advertising Revenue invoiced during such calendar quarter.
perturbation.justification: The changed text in Section 5.5 alters the percentage of ad revenue and the CPM rate that SpinRecords.com pays to NETTAXI. This directly impacts the 'Advertising Revenue' invoiced, as described in Section 5.7. Because the amounts are changed, the payment calculations based on the new percentages and CPM will contradict any prior agreements or expectations regarding the amount to be paid within the 30-day payment schedule specified in Section 5.7.

perturbation.original_text: 8.2 Convenience. NETTAXI may terminate this Agreement at any time for ----------- its convenience, for no reason or for any reason, upon sixty (60) days prior written notice to SpinRecords.com. In the event of such termination, Spinrecords.com shall be entitled to receive and retain all payments made or payable by NETTAXI prior to the date of termination. SpinRecords.com may terminate this Agreement for no reason or for any reason upon sixty (60) days prior written notice to NETTAXI.
perturbation.changed_text: 8.2 Convenience. NETTAXI may terminate this Agreement at any time for ----------- its convenience, for no reason or for any reason, upon thirty (30) days prior written notice to SpinRecords.com. In the event of such termination, Spinrecords.com shall NOT be entitled to receive and retain all payments made or payable by NETTAXI prior to the date of termination. SpinRecords.com may terminate this Agreement for no reason or for any reason upon thirty (30) days prior written notice to NETTAXI.
perturbation.explanation: Here, there is an in-text contradiction, changing the notice period to 30 days and removing the entitlement to retain payments creates a direct conflict with the original terms, especially concerning payments made before termination. Location: Section 8.2
perturbation.contradicted_text: 8.4 Survival of Rights and Obligations Upon Termination. Sections 6 and --------------------------------------------------- 7 shall survive termination or expiration of this Agreement. Notwithstanding anything in the foregoing to the contrary, in the case of termination by NETTAXI for cause pursuant to Section 8.3 [Termination for Cause], NETTAXI shall not be required to pay any fee to SpinRecords.com after termination.
perturbation.justification: The changed text in Section 8.2 directly contradicts the survival clause in Section 8.4. Section 8.2 now states that SpinRecords.com is NOT entitled to payments made before termination, while Section 8.4 implies that certain rights and obligations, including potentially the right to receive payments for services already rendered, survive termination, except in cases of termination for cause as per Section 8.3. The altered text creates a direct conflict and is therefore a strong contradiction.
